g.title: tla-peterson-2proc
g.text: see legend for actions and properties
node labels begin with a short state id

g.title: __legend__
g.text: green = initial, amber = deadlock, red = invariant violation
each node label starts with a short state id
actions: p1-a0, p1-a1, p1-a2, p1-a3, p1-cs, p1-a4, p2-a0, p2-a1, p2-a2, p2-a3, p2-cs, p2-a4
